Hot Water: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_hotwater( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP(0), temperature DECIMAL(5,2), setpoint DECIMAL(5,2), valve INTEGER, volume DECIMAL(7,5), pump INTEGER, flowvolume DECIMAL(7,5))
Mash/Lauter: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_mashlauter(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP(0), temperature DECIMAL(5,2), setpoint DECIMAL(5,2), valve INTEGER, pump INTEGER, pumpspeed INTEGER, agitator INTEGER, agitatorspeed INTEGER, flowmeter DECIMAL(7,2))
Wort Kettle: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_wortkettle(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP(0), temperature DECIMAL(5,2), setpoint DECIMAL(5,2), valve1 INTEGER, valve2 INTEGER, chimneytemperature DECIMAL(5,2), chimneyvalve INTEGER, pump INTEGER, pumpspeed INTEGER, flowmeter DECIMAL(7,2), flowvolume INTEGER)
Ice Water: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_icewater(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP(0), volume DECIMAL(7,5), pump INTEGER)
Glycol#1: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_glycol1(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP(0), temperature DECIMAL(5,2), setpoint DECIMAL(5,2), cooler1 INTEGER, cooler2 INTEGER, pump INTEGER)
Glycol#2: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_glycol2(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP(0), temperature DECIMAL(5,2), setpoint DECIMAL(5,2), cooler1 INTEGER, cooler2 INTEGER, pump INTEGER)
